programme.title: 24 Hours With Cindy Crawford
programme.desc: Kehidupan sehari-hari supermodel Cindy Crawford meliputi berolahraga, makan siang bersama Helena Christensen, dan menyalakan lampu di Empire State Building.

programme.title: 73 Questions With CL
programme.desc: Baru saja tampil di upacara penutupan Olimpiade di kota kelahirannya, Pyeongchang, Korea Selatan, bintang K-pop CL membuka pintu kamarnya di Hollywood Roosevelt Hotel yang bersejarah di Los Angeles tempat ia menginap sementara saat ini ketika Vogue datang mengetuk pintu dan melontarkan 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi tentang Kanye West, lilin favoritnya, penampilan cameo Borat, Disneyland, “Lamborghini Ungu,” eyeliner sebagai aksesori ideal, menjadi pecinta kucing, dan cara mengucapkan “cheers!” dalam bahasa Korea.

programme.title: 24 Hours With BTS In L.A.
programme.desc: sebagai fenomena K-pop global dalam kunjungan besar-besaran pertama mereka ke Los Angeles, di mana grup beranggotakan tujuh orang ini disambut oleh kerumunan penggemar yang antusias dan sorotan media yang gencar. Pada suatu malam langka di akhir perjalanan kilat mereka tepat setelah AMAs, dan sebelum tampil di acara Ellen, para anggota grup naik bus pesta bersama Vogue dan mengguncang kota tersebut.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Winnie Harlow
programme.desc: Model terkenal Winnie Harlow membagikan rahasia kecantikan di rumah dan cara yang tepat untuk menikmati sirsak dalam cuplikan eksklusif tentang rutinitas santainya ini. Saksikan saat Winnie melakukan panggilan FaceTime dengan Tory Lanez, menikmati buah-buahan khas Jamaika, dan bermain Cadoo hingga larut malam.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Winnie Harlow
programme.desc: Model terkenal Winnie Harlow membagikan rahasia kecantikan di rumah dan cara yang tepat untuk menikmati sirsak dalam cuplikan eksklusif tentang rutinitas santainya ini. Saksikan saat Winnie melakukan panggilan FaceTime dengan Tory Lanez, menikmati buah-buahan khas Jamaika, dan bermain Cadoo hingga larut malam.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Dan Levy
programme.desc: Bekerja sama dengan Google Nest: Dan Levy, pencipta dan bintang serial TV populer Schitt's Creek, mengundang Vogue ke rumahnya yang diterangi cahaya hangat dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil didampingi sahabat setianya, Redmond, aktor yang pernah dinominasikan untuk Emmy ini berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan ayahnya, kecintaannya pada Jepang, serta betapa ia (dengan bangga) menikmati segelas cosmopolitan dengan es batu

programme.title: 73 Questions With Emily R.
programme.desc: Model dan aktris Emily Ratajkowski membuka pintu apartemen loft bergaya artistiknya di Los Angeles untuk sesi permainan catur, pesta mendengarkan piringan hitam, dan sesi menggambar dadakan.

programme.title: The Ballad Of Lefty Brown
programme.desc: Seorang Barat yang mendebarkan dan penuh aksi, The Ballad of Lefty Brown adalah kisah tentang kesetiaan, persahabatan, dan upaya tanpa henti untuk mencapai keadilan.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Robert Pattinson
programme.desc: Ikuti Robert Pattinson saat ia berkeliling Paris, mencium aroma parfum, dan duduk di barisan depan pada peragaan busana Dior.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Deepika P.
programme.desc: Saat berkunjung ke Kota New York untuk pemotretan Vogue, Deepika Padukone menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Deepika berbagi pengalamannya hidup dengan depresi, membicarakan kemampuan bulu tangkisnya, dan memamerkan gerakan tariannya yang memukau.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Camila Cabello
programme.desc: Selama berada di pedesaan Inggris, penyanyi keturunan Kuba-Amerika Camila Cabello menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil memetik gitar, Camila bercerita tentang proses penulisan lagunya dan antusiasmenya untuk memerankan versi terbaru Cinderella.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Diplo
programme.desc: Diplo adalah sosok paling menarik yang sering terlewatkan di karpet merah. Dia punya lesung pipit! Dia punya celetukan-celetukan jenaka! Dan mungkin yang paling penting dari semuanya, dia punya gaya yang pas.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Maisie Williams
programme.desc: Bintang Game of Thrones, Maisie Williams, bertekad untuk menikmati Paris Fashion Week sepenuhnya. Dengan mengenakan busana yang serasi bersama pacarnya, Reuben Selby, Maisie menghadiri peragaan busana Thom Browne dan Givenchy.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Greta Gerwig
programme.desc: Aktris, pembuat film, dan sutradara film Barbie, Greta Gerwig, menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat sambil berjalan-jalan santai di Sony Pictures Studios. Dengan pemahaman mendalam tentang seperti apa kehidupan sebagai penulis skenario dan sutradara, Greta menjelaskan secara rinci segala hal yang terlibat dalam proses pembuatan filmnya dan menatap masa depannya di industri ini

programme.title: Bandit
programme.desc: Setelah melarikan diri dari penjara Michigan, seorang penjahat karir yang menawan mengambil identitas baru di Kanada dan kemudian merampok 59 bank dan toko perhiasan sambil diburu oleh satuan tugas polisi. Berdasarkan kisah The Flying Bandit.

programme.title: 73 Questions With CL

programme.title: 73 Questions, Ashley Graham
programme.desc: Ashley menceritakan bagaimana ia bertemu suaminya, produk apa yang benar-benar tak bisa ia tinggalkan, serta bagaimana ia bepergian ke dan dari Fashion Week tanpa repot berkat Lexus yang menyediakan layanan transportasi gratis bagi para desainer, model, editor, pengecer, dan profesional industri sebagai sponsor otomotif resmi New York Fashion Week.

programme.title: God's Country
programme.desc: Ketika seorang profesor perguruan tinggi berhadapan dengan dua pemburu yang dia tangkap sedang memasuki propertinya tanpa izin, dia terlibat dalam pertarungan kemauan yang semakin sengit dengan konsekuensi yang sangat dahsyat.

programme.title: Sinister Tales: The Haunting
programme.desc: Sekelompok teman berkumpul untuk saling menceritakan kisah-kisah menyeramkan yang penuh dengan hantu, misteri, dan kejadian supranatural. Namun, ketika malam semakin larut, mereka menyadari bahwa kisah paling mengerikan bukanlah cerita yang mereka ceritakan, melainkan teror nyata yang mulai menghantui mereka satu per satu.

programme.title: Laugh Riot: The Misadventure
programme.desc: Frankie Blair Presents: Laugh Riot adalah serial komedi stand-up yang dinamis dan menghibur, menampilkan beragam komedian dengan gaya humor yang unik. Dipandu oleh Tahir Moore dan diproduseri oleh Frankie Blair, acara berenergi tinggi ini menghadirkan tawa segar sekaligus merayakan talenta-talenta berbakat yang selama ini kurang mendapat sorotan.

programme.title: Iron Fist: Rebellion
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda dianugerahi kemampuan bela diri yang luar biasa serta kekuatan mistis yang dikenal sebagai Iron Fist.

programme.title: Xena: Warrior Princess S2
programme.desc: When Callisto escapes from prison, she builds an army of evil and sends Joxer to tell Xena that she's going to continue killing. Perdicus marries Gabrielle, but Callisto interrupts their honeymoon.

programme.title: James Martin's French Adventure
programme.desc: James arrives in the misty gardens of Claude Monet's house in Giverny and walks across its iconic Japanese bridge to gaze at the water lilies made famous by the artist - Monet loved his food and had quite a brood to feed, with he and his second wife having had eight children between them. Thinking of this hungry horde, James sets up his mobile kitchen nearby to cook a delicious dish of crab - James's self-confessed idea of heaven - and dulse. There is a peek inside Monet's kitchen as James hears how he collected recipes from the various restaurants at which he dined - meanwhile, Eric Guerin serves pike - one of Monet's favourite fish - at his restaurant Le Jardin des Plumes just down the road. In a nearby orchard on the day of their annual harvest, James prepares an autumnal treat of apple doughnuts - when back home, he then cooks a Normandy tart and a very original omelette.

programme.title: James Martin's French Adventure
programme.desc: Jura: James heads to the region of Jura and learns about the region's remarkable apples and pears from a local farmer who also shows him around the beautiful orchard that he owns. [S,AD,HD] S1 Ep8

programme.title: Goldfinger
programme.desc: 007 investigates Goldfinger who is suspected of smuggling England's goldSean Connery's Bond takes on the evil Goldfinger alongside Honor Blackman's Pussy Galore in this iconic tale. Can he stop him from destroying all the world's gold?Sean Connery's Bond investigates Goldfinger, who is suspected of smuggling England’s gold reserves. Goldfinger’s greed is exceeded only by his disrespect for human life.

programme.title: Ainsley's Fantastic Flavours
programme.desc: Making some all-time favourites, those recipes we come back to again and again, Ainsley celebrates the classics. Real nostalgic nibbles, from steak frites to pizza Margherita, and sports broadcasters Craig Doyle and Liam MacDevitt visit the kitchen for some baked goodies. Ainsley also heads out to find out more about an essential ingredient for so many classics: flour.

programme.title: ITV News

programme.title: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programme.desc: Joining Alan this time are film Calendar Girl Celia Imrie to talk about her latest novel and critically-acclaimed novelist Sebastian Faulks - we also meet rare-breed geese and Alan takes up the ancient art of chair caning.

programme.title: Prue Leith's Cotswold Kitchen
programme.desc: Prue is joined in her kitchen by designer and TV presenter Patrick Grant, who cooks a delicious slow-cooked fenugreek lamb dish and tells Prue how he inherited his love of cooking from his dad along with an old spice rack which he still uses at home - no-knead focaccia is also on the menu for Prue, who explains that it takes a bit of patience but is well worth the wait. Flavoured with rosemary, salt and olives, Prue declares that this is a dish you should definitely find the time to make - meanwhile, John builds a dovecote for the garden which proves to be a bigger and bolder project than any that have come before, and Prue's food hero is a cake-maker who made a royal wedding cake. John then joins Prue in the kitchen for afternoon scones - including an unusual option of butternut squash scones served with whipped goats' cheese and red peppers - and Prue has a hack for the best way to cut a celebration cake.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world. [S,HD]

programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: Dermot brings his journey to a close on the surf-battered shores of Strandhill, paddling out with Rebelle Surf into the cold Atlantic to understand why these waves draw people from across the world. He meets a couple who've eaten their way around the globe and landed here, bringing the bold, smoky flavours of the Basque country to the beach in Strandhill. Together they cook turbot over fire, a dish where Ireland and Spain meet to make something delicious. Then it's Dermot's turn. Joined by a host of faces he's met along the way, he takes everything he's seen and eaten along the series. He cooks a proper feast: fresh seafood, a deep, warming stew, and a fruit dessert that carries the sweetness of the whole journey. From the Causeway Coastal Route to the Wild Atlantic Way, it's a meal that tells the full story of the road behind him.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Causton is buzzing at the opening of a new brewery on the site of a famously cursed Abbey. However, excitement turns to fear when a man is found boiled to death in one of the vats. DCI Barnaby and DS Winter are puzzled; could this really be about beer?

programme.title: Thunderball
programme.desc: The fourth entry in the James Bond film series. Led by one-eyed evil mastermind Emilio Largo, the terrorist group SPECTRE hijacks two warheads from a NATO plane and threatens widespread nuclear destruction to extort 100 million pounds. James Bond is sent to recover the warheads from the heart of Largo's lair in the Bahamas - while facing underwater attacks from sharks and men alike, he must also convince the enchanting Domino, who serves as Largo's mistress, to become a key ally in his mission.

programme.title: DNA Journey
programme.desc: Comedians and best mates Rob Beckett and Romesh Ranganathan embark on a road trip to find out about their family history using a mix of DNA and genealogy and meet family they never knew existed - while there are plenty of belly laughs along the way, there's also some surprising and moving emotion from TV's top funny men. Romesh really wants to connect to his Sri Lankan heritage after growing up in Crawley, while South Londoner Rob is simply hoping that his family aren't all 'wrong'uns' - however, things don't start well for Rob as he finds out his family in the past are well acquainted with the local prison before finding out that his hero ancestor turned the family's fortunes around with some Beckett determination and grit. Meanwhile, Romesh finds out to his joy and horror that he comes from a dynasty of Ayurvedic doctors in Sri Lanka along his paternal line - while expressing pride at what his family achieved from humble beginnings, he worries about his mother Shanthi finding out...

When they then escape, Manny plots a plan to steal Captain Gutt's ship and get everyone home in a dangerous voyage... but the pirates follow them as they seek revenge.

programme.desc: Detective drama series. The local doctor soon comes under suspicion, but the cool-headed Poirot avoids jumping to conclusions.

programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. Sensing danger surrounding her sister Carrie-Louise, Ruth Van Rydock enlists the help of her old friend Miss Marple - when Carrie-Louise's beloved stepbrother is then murdered during a dress rehearsal of an amateur stage show, Jane has to draw from her deep understanding of human character in order to unpick the conjuring trick played out by the murderer and reveal their identity.

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Crime drama. It's the winter of 1971 - the team are called to investigate the violent and peculiar murder of an Oxford college don, but when Thursday makes an unexpected discovery, Endeavour's suitability to work on the case is compromised and he is sidelined. Meanwhile, things at home become quite tense for Thursday and Win when they receive disturbing news from abroad, and although officially off the clock, Endeavour follows a lead that unravels an intricate plot beyond his wildest imagination. Endeavour finds himself at an abandoned hotel where the body of another fellow bus passenger is found murdered in the same peculiar way as the college don - trapped with a group he can't be sure to trust, Endeavour slowly comes to learn the disturbing truth about those he finds himself amongst. With Endeavour in danger, the buck rests with Thursday to put together the final pieces of the puzzle.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Susan Bartlett's body is discovered in a wood, villagers assume she killed herself because she could not have children. However, when it comes to light that her suicide note - in the form of an email - was sent too late, Barnaby soon finds himself in the midst of witchcraft, ancient potions, infidelity and land feuds.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama. When the bellringers of Midsomer Wellow each win 5000 pounds on a horse called Ring-a-Ding, they see it as a good omen for success in the forthcoming Striking Competition until one of their number is found shot dead in the belfry - Greg Tutt was a serial womaniser recently dumped by his wife Sue, but DCI Tom Barnaby suspects that there is more to the murder than affairs of the heart. Retired RAF officer Reggie Barton hates the bellringers and tells his son Hugh that he is leaving his estate to the church on condition that they are stopped - bellringer Emma Tysoe is then brutally murdered on her wedding day with words from an ancient village rhyme left at the scene. Frances Le Bon and the rest of the team receive letters with other lines from the poem and fear they are next - as Barnaby's wife Joyce pours through Midsomer Wellow's history books with the help of parish archivist Maisie Gooch, the detectives must solve a riddle before the killer strikes again...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama. Devington College - a public school of minimal academic attainment but endowed with contacts - dominates the economy and social life of Midsomer Parva - when the activities of its Mafia-like elite Pudding Club lead to murder and mayhem in both college and village.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the characters created by Ann Cleeves. Meanwhile, Joe finally makes amends with the demons from his own past.

programme.title: The Lady
programme.desc: Drama based on real events. Confronted with the sudden appearance of a ghost from her past at a party, Jane starts to unravel and her relationship with Tommy hangs in the balance - on a make-or-break holiday in the south of France with Tommy's family, tensions reach a head with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: The Lady

Wealthy landowner Gregory Lancaster breathes his last surrounded by his wife Hermione, his daughter Rose, and Rose's partner Craig Coffley - Dr Isaac Vernon confirms the death as Gregory's son, Antarctic expedition leader Felix, arrives just too late to see his father. Undertakers Caleb Southwood and Ellie Loxley go to the body only to discover that it has gone missing - when the Barnabys and Betty see Nelson arrive with the news, Barnaby and Nelson find new pathologist Kam Karimore in place at Malton Hall and Nelson tells Barnaby that they have got off on the wrong foot. Concluding that the body was removed via the window, Barnaby and Nelson interview the family and learn that Felix plans to affect a quick sale while a visit from the Reverend Melissa Ackers shows bad blood between the family and the vicar - when the body of the Lancasters' ex-nanny is stolen from the graveyard, Barnaby and Nelson are drawn into a macabre world as they seek to identify the culprit.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The village of Blacktrees-on-Marsh has long been haunted by a Cold War prophecy, prompting a small group of locals to form Midsomer’s first doomsday prepper group. Founded two decades ago by the obsessive Warren Kaine, the group provides comfort to its paranoid members - until the morning Warren receives a hoax call that nuclear missiles have launched. Racing to his bombproof underground bunker, he radios the others to join him. But as dawn breaks over village green serenity rather than a scorched earth, Warren's resentful wife Clodagh arrives at the shelter to find him dead. Pathologist Fleur Perkins discovers Warren was suffocated after someone with technical skills tampered with the air filter. As DCI John Barnaby and DS Jamie Winter investigate, they must determine if someone was desperate to get their hands on the bunker, or if a killer is targeting the preppers. The pressure is on to catch the culprit before they strike again.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Ronnie and Matt are stumped when they investigate the murders of David and Elaine Lerner, who were stabbed to death as they slept. The Lerners seemed to have been universally loved, and there is not a single lead which points to grievances against them - were they really the intended victims? Soon the police realise that a much more likely target for attack is the previous owner of the house - Camilla Mallon, a banker embroiled in a hedge fund scandal. Could the murders be a case of mistaken identity? As crown prosecutors Jake Thorne and Alesha Phillips try to navigate a case in which the suspect has no apparent motive or intent to commit the crime, can they make a murder charge stick? Meanwhile, Jake's old mentor Margaret Rumsfield argues that the accused should only face manslaughter charges.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The team investigate when mother and carer Lia Brown is killed by a stray bullet, and find themselves struggling to understand the involvement of 12 year old Kaden Blake in her death. Kaden is caught up in the local gang culture, and keeping silent is his only protection. DS Matt Devlin is drawn to this damaged boy, saddened to see a life so doomed by circumstance and furious that local dealer and gang leader Mark Ellis remains untouchable by the law. Matt forces the hands of the crown prosecutors to move Ellis into the frame for Lia's death, but the culture of intimidation and silence which rules gang life seems set to undo all of the team's good work. It is up to Kaden himself to find the courage to speak out - but when he does so, he sets in motion a shattering chain of events.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Forest ranger Felicity Ward is driving at night when she is blinded by a searing light from an unidentified flying object - the following morning sees her car found abandoned at the roadside. Barnaby is called to the crime scene where a black pod containing Felicity's body is discovered - meanwhile, the nearby village of Cooper Hill is buzzing with news of the UFO as hoteliers Victor and Nadine Campbell, their daughter Orla, tour operator Abigail Tonev and her garage-owning son Nathan rely on a stream of ufologists for their businesses. Barnaby and Nelson visit Felicity's mother Valerie and fiance Brogan and they reveal that Felicity was going to confront ufologist Carter Faulkner about an illegal campsite - as they dig deeper, Barnaby and Nelson unearth suspicions, betrayals, and long-buried secrets of a terrestrial nature in their search for the truth.

programme.desc: Jo bares her soul to Katie and admits she wants to sever ties with Andy, but can't face leaving Sarah. Nicola tries to inspire the choir and Brenda gets a surprise visit.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the characters created by Ann Cleeves. When respected surgeon Dan Marsden is shot dead days before his retirement and his teenage daughters Mira and Karen are abducted, DCI Vera Stanhope, DS Joe Ashworth and DC Kenny Lockhart must race against time to track down the killer and save the sisters. As newcomer DC Barry Kelman joins the team, it is not long before the case takes a violent and unexpected turn.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting outside the Old Bailey leaves one police officer dead and another wounded in what seems to be a targeted attack on a witness giving evidence in an attempted murder trial. However, as Ronnie and the team investigate, they are surprised to learn that the gunman was specifically targeting police officers because he believes that his family were the victims of a police cover-up. The case is a taxing one and leaves the whole team emotionally spent. Things get tougher when defence barrister Doug Greer argues that his client was the victim of institutional racism. Have the detectives gone too far in their mission to bring a cop-killer to justice? The trial is at risk of being derailed because of a failure to separate the personal from the professional - can senior crown prosecutors Jake and Alesha manage to convince the jury that the defendant is a murderer rather than a victim?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When a robbery goes wrong, an innocent have-a-go hero is shot dead and the two thieves take a cab driver hostage as they make their getaway. The police manage to capture one of the suspects, Frank Donovan, and they are desperate to find out the whereabouts of his hostage, who has a potentially fatal medical condition. Donovan realises that his knowledge gives him leverage, and he offers the team a deal - he will tell them where the cab driver is in return for an immunity agreement. Ronnie and Sam have just ten hours to find the hostage before the CPS is forced to agree to Donovan's terms. Donovan's lawyer, the uncompromising Miriam Pescatore, drives a hard bargain and, with no physical evidence to connect Donovan to the crime scene, must Jake and Alesha watch a self-confessed killer walk free?

programme.title: Madam Rose
programme.desc: Keira seorang gadis lugu yang terpaksa berjuang melawan dunia hitam dan menjadi pengedar narkoba, demi membiayai hidup Ibu dan Adiknya serta adanya niat membalas dendam kepada seseorang.

programme.title: Really Horror
programme.desc: Cak Lontong dan anak indigo Naomi Angelia Sea akan membahas dan membedah hal-hal horor dengan tema-tema yang seru. Kita akan buktikan bersama apakah itu nyata atau hanya gosip saja.

programme.title: Tulah 6/13
programme.desc: Gilang memutuskan untuk berlibur bersama Sarah dan Kevin, dua orang sahabatnya sejak SMA untuk merayakan ulang tahunnya. Rencana tersebut terganggu dengan kehadiran dua orang tamu tak diundang.

programme.title: Dapil Komeng
programme.desc: Sketsa Komedi yang menceritakan kelucuan Komeng dalam mewujudkan mimpinya dengan cara masuk ke lemari rahasia yang akan membawanya kemana saja dan bertemu siapa saja yang dia inginkan

programme.title: Bisik Hati Lara
programme.desc: LARA sebagai anak sulung, tak punya pilihan selain harus mencari pekerjaan tambahan, demi adik satu- satunya, LENA, bisa melanjutkan SMA nya sampai lulus, sembari memastikan terapi pengobatan Ibu.

programme.title: Brata S1
programme.desc: Brata, seorang detektif muda sedang menyelidiki kasus pembunuhan mutilasi. Ketika Vera, seorang dokter forensik memeriksa korban, dia menemukan bahwa mereka berasal dari 5 korban berbeda.

programme.title: Angling Dharma S1
programme.desc: Pertarungan Angling Dharma dan Syudawirat menyebabkan Angling Dharma terluka parah. Angling Dharma terpaksa meninggalkan Malwapati beserta para pengikutnya.

programme.title: Trip Among Rans
programme.desc: Pergi berlibur ditengah masa PSBB membuat Raffi dan nagita menjadi super heboh dalam mempersiapkan segala kebutuhan liburannya demi mendapatkan liburan yang aman dan tetap nyaman

programme.title: Negeri 5 Menara
programme.desc: Negeri 5 Menara series bercerita tentang Alif, pemuda minangkabau memiliki cita-cita tinggi. Ia ingin sekolah di ITB & menjadi sosok seperti idolanya, B.J. Habibie. Sayangnya keinginan Alif tidak mendapat respon baik dari ibunya.

programme.title: Love Daddy
programme.desc: Perjuangan 3 orang ayah dalam mengasuh anak remajanya. Meski memiliki pola asuh yang berbeda, namun mereka memiliki satu kesamaan: rasa sayang dan kekhawatiran yang berlebihan terhadap anak-anaknya.

programme.title: Akhir Kisah Si Doel
programme.desc: Kepulangan Sarah bersama Dul ke Jakarta, disambut bahagia oleh keluarga Doel. Namun hal tersebut juga membuat Zaenab, Sarahdan Doel dihadapkan pada dilemma untuk menentukan pilihan.

programme.title: CLBK The Series
programme.desc: Mini series yang menceritakan suka dan duka mencari pasangan melalui kencan buta.

programme.title: Mr Bean Animation
programme.desc: Mr. Bean laki-laki yang mempunyai sikap sedikit kekanak-kanakan yang berusaha bertahan hidup di kota London dan sangat kompetititf. Dalam series animasi, ia digambarkan lebih beruntung dan kompeten dari versi live actionya.

programme.title: Apose Boss Baru S3
programme.desc: Menceritakan tentang usaha Andre kembali kepada Surya. Selain Andre, Dicky juga kehilangan jabatannya sebagai boss karena skandalnya ketahuan. Karena skandal Dicky, posisi CEO kini diganti dengan Bos Baru yaitu Ayu Ting-Ting.

programme.title: Warkop Reborn 3
programme.desc: Ditugaskan sebagai agen polisi rahasia, Dono, Kasino & Indro terlibat dalam sebuah pembuatan film komedi bersama Inka, artis sinetron hijrah ke dunia film. Namun mereka justru terjebak bersama disebuah ruangan hingga jatuh pingsan

programme.title: Waktunya Srimulat Bercyanda
programme.desc: Program Sitkom dengan Srimulat, group lawak terbesar dan terpopuler serta memiliki penggemar dari berbagai kalangan masyarakat yang menampilkan kisah-kisah lucu dan sedang menjadi topik hangat

programme.title: Single
programme.desc: Film ini bercerita tentang pencarian cinta empat pemuda lajang yang tinggal & kuliah di Bandung, Agus, Doni, Olip & Bimo. Mereka merupakan mahasiswa perguruan tinggi UNB di Kota Bandung. Mereka satu angkatan & jurusan Teknik Sipil

programme.title: Waktunya Srimulat Bercyanda
programme.desc: Program Sitkom dengan Srimulat, group lawak terbesar dan terpopuler serta memiliki penggemar dari berbagai kalangan masyarakat yang menampilkan kisah-kisah lucu dan sedang menjadi topik hangat

programme.title: Vidi-O-Call
programme.desc: Video Call, salah satu cara Vidi terus berkomunikasi dengan para sahabatnya selama masa pandemi. Santai namun mendalam, membeberkan segala isu dan fakta, termasuk hal-hal sensitif dari sahabat Vidi

programme.title: Secret High School
programme.desc: Azka dibully di sekolah elit Sudharma High School. Kehadiran murid baru bernama Shaka mengubah segalanya. Di balik karismanya, Shaka menyimpan misi mencari adik yang hilang.

programme.title: Negeri 5 Menara
programme.desc: Negeri 5 Menara series bercerita tentang Alif, pemuda minangkabau memiliki cita-cita tinggi. Ia ingin sekolah di ITB & menjadi sosok seperti idolanya, B.J. Habibie. Sayangnya keinginan Alif tidak mendapat respon baik dari ibunya.

programme.title: Diary Putih Abu Abu
programme.desc: Sekelompok cewek yang bersekolah di pinggiran Jakarta bertemu dan bersahabat karena memiliki kesamaan. Keakraban mereka mulai dikenal karena konten yang sering mereka posting di social media.

programme.title: Dapuk
programme.desc: Sketsa Komedi Oleh Denny Caknan, Cak Percil dan Abah Kirun. Dalam Lakon Keseharian. Yang Memberikan Solusi Penuh Masalah Dibalut Dengan Komedi Jawa Yang Kental.

programme.title: Sincerely
programme.desc: Drama romantis yang mengikuti Fajar, seorang people pleaser yang menjadi asisten pribadi Farah, CEO perfeksionis. Fajar terjebak dilema saat ditugaskan memata-matai Farah, namun justru jatuh cinta dan terlibat konflik rumit.

programme.title: Little Rebels Cinema Club
programme.desc: Seorang remaja 14 tahun, bercita-cita membuat film bersama sahabat-sahabatnya. Mereka terinspirasi adegan film zombie yang pernah mereka tonton satu kali dan berusaha mereplikasinya menggunakan handycam milik kakak laki-lakinya.

programme.title: Juki
programme.desc: Berada pada puncak ketenarannya, Juki dicintai banyak orang karena sikapnya yang polos, jenaka, dan berani untuk beda. Hingga sebuah kesalahan membuatnya berbalik menjadi musuh nomor satu masyarakat.

programme.title: Mr Bean Animation
programme.desc: Mr. Bean laki-laki yang mempunyai sikap sedikit kekanak-kanakan yang berusaha bertahan hidup di kota London dan sangat kompetititf. Dalam series animasi, ia digambarkan lebih beruntung dan kompeten dari versi live actionya.

programme.title: Tiba - Tiba Berondong
programme.desc: Bella, dosen psikologi 35 tahun yang mapan namun kesepian. Di dorong dengan tekanan keluarga, ia menggunakan aplikasi kencan & bertemu Langit, pria jenaka ternyata baru 19 tahun dan menjadi mahasiswa barunya, memicu dilema asmara.

programme.title: Everyone loves Raymond
programme.desc: From 2002. Ray and Debra's friendship with another couple is put to the test, when the couple's insufferable young gets on Ray's nerves.

programme.title: Everyone loves Raymond
programme.desc: From 2002. Robert has met a wonderful woman who seems too perfect to be true. And maybe she is too?

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: From 2018. The team investigates the murder of a sergeant, who was hailed as a war hero for his efforts overseas.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: From 2018. After his daughter ends up in the hospital after an overdose, Fornell asks Gibbs to do whatever it takes to stop the drug dealers in the area where her daughter was found.

programme.title: Extreme collectors
programme.desc: From 2023. Darlene from Vancouver hoards, believes in New Age healing and lives in a messy home. She sleeps outside because of hoarding. Winter is approaching, and experts step in to help Darlene.

programme.title: Charter fever
programme.desc: From 2018. We get to know the love-struck couple Unni and Trond, who are ready for a holiday. Trond Harr and Vivian check out the local carnival and Aurora takes her sister Fleur and mother Bibbi to karaoke.

programme.title: Charter fever
programme.desc: From 2018. The Haider family are ready for a new holiday trip, but the hotel is not quite to their liking. Trond and Unni do one of the funnest things they know, namely bingo, and the loving couple Markus and Hanne give us shopping tips.

programme.title: The prisoners at the Fort
programme.desc: From 2023. The children's heroes from NRK Super, Margrethe Røed, Silje S. Winje and Matias Alegria meet the popular artists and TV faces Rein Alexander, Vidar Villa and Rikke Isaksen for an extreme duel at height.

programme.title: Kjartan cleans up - at home
programme.desc: From 2024. Oskar eats for the sake of training, and is concerned with nutritional content. But he is getting tired of tasteless and powder-based food. Kjartan wants to show him that he can live rich in protein - completely without powder.

programme.title: Confessions of Octomom
programme.desc: From 2025. Natalie Suleman, known as "Octomom", shocks the world after giving birth to the world's first surviving octuplets. When her identity is leaked to the media, the family's life is changed forever.

programme.title: Adventurous renovation
programme.desc: From 2022. In the first episode of the season, the trip goes to beautiful Orre on Jæren outside Stavanger. There are plans for major changes here. Halvor takes the boys surfing, and the accommodation facilities this week are probably a little out of the ordinary.

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: From 2020. Marcus wants to retire to spend more time with his family. But when an old and dangerous threat threatens Mike's life, Marcus is forced to put retirement on hold.

programme.title: The Holiday

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter
programme.desc: From 2024. The brutal origin story of Marvel's iconic villain Kraven, a man with a complex relationship with his ruthless father, who becomes the world's greatest hunter.

programme.title: The taste of hunger
programme.desc: From 2021. Married couple Maggie and Carsten open the restaurant Malus. Their common dream is the famous Michelin star. But one day Carsten receives a letter that his wife loves someone else.

programme.title: Sicario 2: Soldier
programme.desc: From 2018. The drug war on the US-Mexico border is escalating, and the cartels have begun smuggling terrorists across the border. But FBI agent Graver is determined to win, and any means are allowed.

programme.title: Make a pie
programme.desc: From 2024. When Anette and Ben's daughter gets a role in a film with movie star Alicia, Ben is quickly attracted to Alicia. As Anette's suspicions about Ben's crush on Alicia intensify, their secrets and lies threaten to come to light

programme.title: A Simple Favor
programme.desc: From 2018. Single mother Stephanie befriends the glamorous, fascinating and mysterious Emily. Suddenly, Emily disappears and Stephanie begins to investigate what has happened.

programme.title: Masterminds
programme.desc: From 2016. David Ghantt is a wealthy guy who works for a money transport company and is about to marry the crazy Jandice, and he dreams of a more exciting life. So when his beautiful colleague Kelly suggests they rob their employer, he agrees

programme.title: Stronger
programme.desc: From 2017. The inspiring and true story of Jeff Bauman, an ordinary 27-year-old man, who became a symbol of hope after the horrific bombing during the Boston Marathon in 2013.

programme.title: Official Secrets
programme.desc: From 2019. The true story of a British whistleblower who leaked information to the media about an illegal NSA operation, the purpose of which was to pressure the UN Security Council to approve the invasion of Iraq in 2003.

programme.title: White Chicks
programme.desc: From 2004. Ambitious but down-on-his-luck FBI agents Marcus and Kevin are hanging on by a tightrope at work and must go undercover as two blonde diva sisters to keep their jobs.

programme.title: My Blueberry Nights
programme.desc: From 2007. Elizabeth, a disillusioned young woman, embarks on a journey of self-examination to overcome a major heartbreak.

programme.title: E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: From 1982. A lost little extraterrestrial creature, three million light years from home. A lonely ten-year-old boy who takes him home. Two lives that are changed by a timeless experience and a friendship without earthly boundaries.

programme.title: Bombshell
programme.desc: From 2019. Inspired by the true scandal of the women who brought down the man who created the most powerful and controversial media empire of all time, Fox News.

programme.title: Haisommer
programme.desc: From 1975. On an idyllic beach during the high season, a shark attacks and kills several of the bathers. Three men start a hunt to neutralize the murderous shark.

programme.title: Drive-Away Dolls
programme.desc: From 2024. In this comedy, we follow Jamie, a liberated and free-spirited soul who has just broken up with yet another lover, and her rigid friend Marian, who desperately needs to let go.

programme.title: Doomsday
programme.desc: In Doomsday, a deadly virus resurfaces decades after quarantine. As chaos erupts, a team enters the walled-off zone to find a cure. Action-packed and gritty, it's a battle for survival.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 2
programme.desc: With the nation of Panem in a full scale war, Katniss confronts President Snow in the final showdown.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: In *12 Monkeys*, Bruce Willis plays a time-traveling convict trying to prevent a deadly virus, while Brad Pitt shines as a manic asylum inmate. Directed by Terry Gilliam, it's a mind-bending sci-fi thriller.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: In *Waterworld*, Kevin Costner stars as a lone maverick in a flooded future Earth, protecting a mother and daughter from a tribe of ruthless nomads. Dennis Hopper delivers a memorable villainous performance in this thrilling adventure.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Es di kutub telah mencair, dan bumi ditutupi oleh air. Manusia-manusia yang tersisa pergi mengarungi lautan untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it's a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Jack Harper, seorang tukang reparasi drone yang ditempatkan di Bumi yang telah dirusak oleh perang dengan makhluk luar angkasa, mempertanyakan identitasnya setelah menyelamatkan wanita yang terus muncul dalam mimpinya.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 1
programme.desc: A massive earthquake creates a chain of events that threaten two of the largest nuclear reactors.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse, Pt 1
programme.desc: Tsunami menghancurkan Waikiki dan memicu bencana berantai. Gunung berapi meletus, air mendidih muncul dari bumi, Hoover Dam runtuh, hingga Mount Rushmore meledak oleh lava.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 2
programme.desc: A massive earthquake creates a chain of events that threaten two of the largest nuclear reactors.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse, Pt 2
programme.desc: Hotel-hotel di Las Vegas telah ambruk ke dalam tanah, Dr. Hill dan para penyintas yang tersisa berpacu untuk melarikan diri. Sementara itu, gempa bumi dahsyat mengancam akan membelah Amerika Utara menjadi dua dan pembangkit listrik tenaga nuklir berada tepat di jalurnya.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: In *Pitch Black*, Vin Diesel stars as Riddick, a dangerous convict stranded on a desert planet with survivors. Facing carnivorous monsters and scorching suns, they must trust each other to survive the deadly night.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: Sebuah pesawat penumpang yang mengalami kecelakaan terdampar di sebuah planet yang bermandikan sinar matahari. Namun nyawa para korban selamat mulai terancam ketika monster-monster karnivora muncul saat gerhana.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: In *12 Monkeys*, Bruce Willis plays a time-traveling convict trying to prevent a deadly virus, while Brad Pitt shines as a manic asylum inmate. Directed by Terry Gilliam, it's a mind-bending sci-fi thriller.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: Di dunia masa depan yang hancur karena penyakit, seorang narapidana dikirim kembali ke masa lalu untuk mengumpulkan informasi tentang virus buatan manusia yang memusnahkan sebagian besar populasi manusia di planet ini.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: In *Pitch Black*, Vin Diesel stars as Riddick, a dangerous convict stranded on a desert planet with survivors. Facing carnivorous monsters and scorching suns, they must trust each other to survive the deadly night.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: Sebuah pesawat penumpang yang mengalami kecelakaan terdampar di sebuah planet yang bermandikan sinar matahari. Namun nyawa para korban selamat mulai terancam ketika monster-monster karnivora muncul saat gerhana.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Hard Target (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Seorang wanita menyewa seorang gelandangan sebagai pemandunya menjelajahi New Orleans untuk mencari ayahnya yang hilang. Dalam prosesnya, mereka menemukan permainan kucing-kucingan yang mematikan di balik hilangnya ayahnya.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: In Cape Fear, Robert De Niro plays a vengeful ex-con stalking his former lawyer, played by Nick Nolte. Directed by Martin Scorsese, this suspense-filled thriller is a chilling classic remake.

programme.title: Cape Fear (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Seorang terpidana pemerkosaan, yang dibebaskan dari penjara setelah menjalani hukuman empat belas tahun, menguntit keluarga pengacara yang awalnya membelanya.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Total Recall (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Seorang pekerja pabrik, Douglas Quaid, mulai curiga bahwa dirinya adalah mata-mata setelah mengunjungi Rekall - sebuah perusahaan yang menyediakan klien dengan memori palsu yang ditanamkan tentang kehidupan yang ingin mereka jalani - terjadi kesalahan dan dia mendapati dirinya dalam pelarian.

programme.title: Everest
programme.desc: Berdasarkan kisah nyata pendaki yang berjuang bertahan hidup melawan badai salju dahsyat saat mendaki puncak tertinggi di dunia tahun 1996.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Di masa depan saat bumi tertutup air, seorang pelaut mutan melindungi wanita dan anak kecil yang memegang peta menuju daratan kering.

programme.title: Dracula Untold
programme.desc: 1462, Transylvania menikmati kedamaian di bawah pemerintahan Vlad III dan istri tercintanya, Mirena. Namun, perang dengan Turki dan perjanjian dengan iblis akan mengubah hidup Vlad selamanya.

programme.title: Evan Almighty

programme.title: Puss In Boots

programme.title: Puss in Boots: The Last Wish

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Pemburu monster legendaris dikirim ke Transylvania untuk menghentikan Count Dracula yang sedang menjalankan rencana jahat.

programme.title: The Adjustment Bureau

programme.title: 3AM, Ep 1
programme.desc: Seorang pegawai baru mengusik keberadaan hantu-hantu di kantornya pada hari pertama bekerja. Ia pun segera merenungkan perbuatannya usai mengalami sejumlah peristiwa nan menyeramkan saat bertugas di malam hari.

programme.title: 3AM, Ep 4
programme.desc: Sekelompok teman mengalami serangkaian peristiwa supranatural saat pergi berkemah di dalam sebuah hutan nan angker. Siapakah yang berhasil lolos dari hutan saat fajar tiba?

programme.title: Creepy Pasta
programme.desc: Terperangkap di sebuah rumah yang ditinggalkan, seorang pria tanpa nama mati-matian mencari petunjuk tentang bagaimana dia bisa sampai di sana. Jawabannya tersembunyi dalam serangkaian video viral yang mengganggu, yang masing-masing mulai menginfeksi pikirannya.

programme.title: 3AM, Ep 1

programme.title: The Elite Of Devils
programme.desc: Lima mahasiswa tingkat akhir diundang ke sebuah rumah besar bergaya klasik milik kalangan elit oleh seorang profesor, di mana sang profesor membuat mereka ketakutan dan memperlihatkan kekuatan jahatnya sebelum mengambil keputusan.

programme.title: Zhong Kui Exorcism
programme.desc: Jong-Gyu, seorang pengusir setan, melawan monster rubah yang menggoda setelah mereka menghancurkan hidupnya. Didorong oleh amarah, ia berlatih dengan seorang pertapa, menggunakan pedang pembunuh iblis. Perjalanannya mencapai puncaknya dalam pertarungan melawan raja iblis dunia bawah.

programme.title: The Case Of Disappearances
programme.desc: Ketika Qing Cheng masih remaja, ia diserang oleh monster mutan yang tidak dikenal dan kehilangan keluarga serta ingatannya. Ia dianggap oleh penduduk desa sebagai orang yang tidak menyenangkan yang akan membawa bencana.

programme.title: The Moon
programme.desc: Seorang astronaut terdampar di luar angkasa karena sebuah kecelakaan saat melakukan penerbangan luar angkasa. Mantan direktur pusat antariksa pun berusaha keras untuk membawanya kembali ke bumi dengan selamat.

programme.title: Hopeless
programme.desc: Seorang remaja ingin melarikan diri dari kampung halamannya di mana kekerasan sering terjadi di antara tetangga. Karena putus asa membutuhkan uang, ia bergabung dengan sebuah geng untuk membantu keluarganya. Hidup barunya mulai terjebak dalam situasi yang semakin berbahaya saat ia berjuang untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Usury Academy
programme.desc: Aksi akademi di mana anak laki-laki dengan peringkat terendah, yang hidup tanpa mimpi atau harapan, merebut kekuatan uang tanpa ragu-ragu dan berlari dengan kecepatan penuh.

programme.title: Single In Seoul
programme.desc: Yeong-Ho adalah seorang pemengaruh terkenal yang mengagungkan kehidupan lajang. Hyeon-Jin adalah seorang editor yang sangat ingin menemukan pasangan. Keduanya bertemu saat bekerja bersama untuk sebuah buku.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Seorang penagih utang menderita kanker hati dan harus mendapatkan transplantasi hati dalam sepuluh hari. Seorang penipu bersedia mendonorkan hatinya jika ia bisa melacak pria yang memasukkannya ke dalam penjara.

programme.title: My Lovely Angel (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Seorang pria secara tak terduga harus bertanggung jawab untuk merawat seorang gadis buta dan tuli. Namun, hal ini ternyata mengubah hidup mereka berdua.

programme.title: Following (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Sebuah film thriller misteri tentang seorang agen real estat yang diam-diam memasuki rumah klien dan terobsesi dengan seorang influencer media sosial yang suka menipu. Film ini mengeksplorasi tema obsesi, identitas, dan sisi gelap media sosial.

programme.title: Hear Me: Our Summer (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Seorang wanita tunarungu dan seorang pengantar barang menggunakan sepeda motor menemukan koneksi meskipun ada hambatan komunikasi. Mereka menggunakan metafora burung air dan pohon yang gigih untuk melambangkan rintangan dalam percintaan dan mengarah pada komitmen yang lebih lanjut.

programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: Icon of the New Heritage wave: BMW R nineT
programme.desc: In 2013, the BMW R nineT, a puristic retro roadster, came onto the market that one would not have expected from the brand from Munich, which is considered to be conservative. The modern technology is deliberately prepared for individual conversion to custom bikes, which are becoming increasingly popular in the young motorcycle scene worldwide. We show the idea behind the concept of the retro roadster and what qualities and possible weaknesses the classic boxer motorcycle reveals in the practical test. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by the industrial park at the Nürburgring. Headquarters of Phoenix Racing GmbH. From here, the team of Swabia-born Ernst Moser shakes up the world's race tracks. The founding members' obsession with starting their own racing team turned into a successful company in just a few years. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Java House Grand Prix of Arlington, Streets of Arlington, Texas

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Of what used to be over 300 tractor manufacturers, only three remain in Germany today. One of them is DEUTZ. In addition to the change in tractor construction from the simple tractor to the all-rounder with over 100 possible work steps, Made in Germany also shows the lean and efficient production and assembly, which is still largely manual work. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.sub-title: IAA Mobility 2021 – A trade fair is moving
programme.desc: Something had to happen! New name, new location, new trade fair concept. After the decline in visitors in recent years, the International Motor Show is moving from Frankfurt to Munich. In addition to the exhibition halls, visitors can visit the free open space or take test drives. Over 100 premieres from the automotive sector show where the mobility of the future is headed. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether Jaguar, Rolls Royce or Bentley, Aston Martin or McLaren, Dream Cars - England shows the most exciting, beautiful and fastest dream cars from Great Britain. Whether luxury sedan, coupe or super sports car, the cars from England combine tradition with exclusive luxury, exceptional performance and unique British flair. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: It is the "Holy Grail" for Porsche fans and the first Porsche to ever bear the famous name of the design genius from Austria: The Type 64, a racing car from 1938 that is based on the Volkswagen developed by Professor Ferdinand Porsche. Only two of the streamlined cars were built and were intended to take part in a race from Berlin to Rome. But the war intervened... (channel info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Le Mans. The toughest car race in the world. Porsche has competed in the 24-hour classic every year since 1951. The prototypes from Zuffenhausen won 16 times – more often than any other manufacturer in Le Mans history. There are also over 100 class victories. No other brand has shaped the race like Porsche. And no other race is as closely associated with Porsche as Le Mans. Porsche at Le Mans is an incredible success story. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Today we start with our Nordschleife tourists, who - as soon as the track is a little drier - appear again at the ring and pursue their favorite hobby: accelerate and let the tires smoke! (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: BMW M1, the legendary vehicles of the Procar series, are all back at the start in Salzburg for the first time. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: With Perfect Ride the horsepower is thrown. Armin Schwarz's tires glow on ice and snow in Finland. Drift until the snow watch comes. Also: An extravagant duel at the CES in Vegas: Mercedes, the Warrior of the Stars versus Audi, Lord of the Rings. The latest technological wonders in direct comparison. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Half a century of Ferrari. Rearview Mirror gets to the bottom of the Ferrari myth and takes a close look at the red racers from Maranello. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The stuntheroes from Action Concept are tough professionals. They throw themselves off houses, cause cars to fly or explode. Without the necessary seriousness and constant concentration when carrying out your work, nothing works. We sent our reporter Dean Malay to Action Concept to get to know the people, the characters behind the hard shell. Stunt coordinator Domi shows Dean the work processes at Action Concept, but also explains why the stuntman is called Tobi, Heidi. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Pascal Kapp's rallies are different from all other classic car rallies. These include the Upper Bavarian Master Classic, the Saxon Master Classic, the 10 Lakes Rally and, last but not least, the one-day rally 333 minute rally, which - as the name suggests - has to be driven in exactly 333 minutes. A day full of driving fun for the participants with a wide variety of special tests guarantees the best entertainment for the top speed spectators in this episode. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Fine tuning of superlatives – the Mansory Conquistador. A car for 750,000 euros. Pure power and no trace of understatement. With the Mercedes CLK DTM AMG the road becomes a race track. (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6
programme.desc: Drug crime, house searches, chases: Roadwars accompanies a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thamse Vally. (Station info).

programme.title: German Rallycross Championship 2024
programme.desc: Eight races on four different routes: The German Rallycross Championship is looking for its new champion for 2024. The drivers fight for the titles in six different classes on rallycross routes in Germany and the Netherlands. Short sprint races take place on tracks with a mix of asphalt and gravel. (Station info).

programme.title: Belgian Rally Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Belgian Rally Championship is one of the most competitive rally championships at national level. This also attracts prominent guest starters such as Thierry Neuville, Craig Breen and Stéphane Lefebvre. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Children's of Alabama Indy GP, Barber Motorsports Park, Alabama

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2026
programme.sub-title: Grand Prix of Ilse de la Reunion, Clermont-Fernand
programme.desc: The X-Trial World Championship is an indoor motorcycle series in which riders must overcome obstacles on the track (channel info).

programme.title: Supermoto: FIM Supermoto World and European Championship
FIM Enduro World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The show follows the world's best enduro pilots as they compete around the globe. (Station info).

programme.title: Southern 100
programme.desc: Kind of the Roads is a motorcycle road racing series where riders reach speeds of up to 200 mph (channel info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Classic motorcycles are back in fashion. Honda is also reflecting on its great tradition and with the CB 1100 EX has revived a big bike that could have ridden on our streets in the flashy seventies. Nostalgic spoke wheels complete the design of the elegant four-cylinder bike with sufficient 94 hp power, more than enough for a relaxed cruise into the sunset. How does the CB 1100 EX compare to rivals like the BMW R nineT? The Japanese classic in the MOTORVISION TV driving test. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good shape, others a little polished - the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Children's of Alabama Indy GP, Barber Motorsports Park, Alabama

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Maybach – the finest car manufacturer from Germany. Each model is made entirely by hand. An outstanding vehicle, the absolute pinnacle of driving comfort, timeless aesthetics and workmanship. A Maybach is considered the measure of all things modern automotive technology. These vehicles were forgotten for over 60 years - until Mercedes-Benz revived the luxury brand in 2002. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: More and more traffic, tight delivery schedules and a constant flood of information – professional drivers don't have it easy. At the same time, modern trucks offer new digital features that make driving safer and more efficient. MOTORVISION visits the traditional Swedish manufacturer Volvo Trucks, watches the development of new automation systems and goes on a journey with the digital giants. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are the most exciting cars in the world and arouse more desire than any other vehicle, the international coupes from Maserati, Porsche, Bentley, Mercedes and Rolls Royce. With their extraordinary design and powerful engines, coupes arouse more emotions than any other car; they are the epitome of elegance and exclusivity in automobile construction. Dream Cars presents the most breathtaking dream coupes in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The world of classic automobiles is colorful and diverse. Crass rally cars from the eighties with a lot of noise, cute little cars to kiss and big chrome sleds from America with big V8 engines and lots of torque. In "Best of Classic Ride" we once again present you the most beautiful stories from the past broadcasts. (Channel info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: In the seventies and eighties, automobile production boomed and with it automobile advertising. Television advertising for cars is gaining momentum. Even the oil crisis cannot stop global automobile production or car advertising. The spots are becoming more and more imaginative and entertaining. Ultimately, automobile advertising is developing into its own cinematic medium, produced at a high quality and expensively. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name “Green Hell”. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” – a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Today we are at the DTM show event in Munich in the Olympiahalle. A mega event and battle between the Audi and Mercedes brands. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Geneva International Motor Show is traditionally the first European car show of the year and is one of the 5 most important car shows in the world! New generations, top models, vehicles with electric or alternative drives, manufacturers of almost all car brands show new products and cars that you will see on the streets tomorrow. Perfect Ride shows the highlights. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. 5.7 liter displacement, 345 hp, 6 seconds from zero to one hundred and a top speed of 274 km/h - the Corvette C5 was the most brutal monster on America's roads at the time. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Our mechanic guys also urgently need help - the lowrider star is still hanging around tired on the tow truck, even though he's about to dance. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: For the showreel, the stunt heroes at action concept film an epic body fight between law enforcement officers and outlaws on the run - and the full program: severe beatings in close combat, glass bottles burst on heads, bodies fly through walls. Finally, the gangster car flies over 15 meters high, detonates in the air and leaves a trail of destruction behind. Full double action in one episode. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this Top Speed ​​episode, presenter Martin Utberg is invited by the art expert Detlev Kümmel, known from the popular TV show Bares for Rares. Also there are classic car owner Lars Wygoda and artist Jakob Reh, who portrays Lars' Volkswagen Beetle from 1972 in a special way under the attentive eyes of Kümmel. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: From racetrack legends to sporty luxury road cruisers: no automobile manufacturer manages the balancing act between driving pleasure and comfort as well as BMW. With 550 hp and lightweight construction, the M4 CSL is a race track icon. We test it and show its story. What does the BMW M760e stand for? The power says driver's sedan! The luxurious furnishings speak for danger. We'll find out. (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6
programme.desc: Drug crime, house searches, chases: Roadwars accompanies a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thamse Vally. (Station info).

programme.sub-title: Grand Prix of Ilse de la Reunion, Clermont-Fernand
programme.desc: The X-Trial World Championship is an indoor motorcycle series in which riders must overcome obstacles on the track (channel info).

programme.title: FIM Enduro World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The show follows the world's best enduro pilots as they compete around the globe. (Station info).

programme.title: King of the Roads 2024
programme.desc: Kind of the Roads is a motorcycle road racing series where riders reach speeds of up to 200 mph (channel info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Acura Grand Prix of Long Beach, Streets of Long Beach, California

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel info).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Crete is the largest of the Greek islands and a motorcycle paradise. Curves overlooking the sea, mountain passes up to 1200m and sensational panoramas, gorges and hospitable people. We started our day tours to experience Crete from the Robinson Club in Ierapetra. The documentary shows the most beautiful mountain roads and bays in the eastern part of the island. Our day tours led to the famous Dikti Mountains. This film also shows the Lasithi plateau, the famous Vai Beach and a tour to the former hippie village and the caves of Matala. The highlight is the ride up to the mountain village of Ethia on what is probably one of the most spectacular (station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Tenerife is not just a paradise for pensioners and winter refugees. The island also attracts adventurers who want to explore breathtaking landscapes on winding roads on their motorcycles. M-Motorradreisen has now included the unique natural backdrop with the omnipresent, 3715m high Teide, lush forests and deep blue oceans in its program for the second time. This travel documentary shows the most beautiful tours on the two Canary Islands. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.sub-title: Sweden road trip with the VW ID.7 Tour
programme.desc: Long distances and electric cars have not been friends so far. But that should change, for example with this vehicle: The VW ID.7 in the Pro S version offers a range of around 700 km and, as a tourer, also plenty of space - the perfect companion for a road trip. We drive through Sweden in the electric station wagon and check consumption, driving characteristics and comfort. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: These four-wheelers can handle everything from sand to water to difficult terrain. Even on a week-long expedition through the most remote places, they don't give up. We check what's behind the new Land Rover Defender Trophy and test the special model. We also reveal 5 exciting facts about the Ineos Grenadier. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Acura Grand Prix of Long Beach, Streets of Long Beach, California

programme.title: Alive Or Preferably Dead
programme.desc: Two brothers, Monty and Ted, will inherit $300,000 if they manage to live together for six months.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Jackie Chan plays a dual role as twins separated at birth who grow up and cross paths. Two brothers, one becomes a famous conductor and pianist in New York, another becomes a racecar driver and bodyguard in Hong Kong. When the conductor travels to Hong Kong to give a concert, the twins get caught up in each other's business, about which they are anything but experts.

programme.title: Detroit 9000
programme.desc: A pair of Detroit policemen investigates a robbery that occurred at a black congressman’s fundraising banquet.

programme.title: Alive Or Preferably Dead
programme.desc: Two brothers, Monty and Ted, will inherit $300,000 if they manage to live together for six months.

programme.title: Twin Dragons

programme.title: The Glass House
programme.desc: After the parents of Ruby (Leelee Sobieski) and her younger brother, Rhett (Trevor Morgan), are killed in a car crash, their parents' best friends, Erin and Terry Glass (Diane Lane, Stellan Skarsgard), become their guardians. The children hear promises of a world of opulence and California fun -- all they have to do is move into the Glasses' gated house. Before very long, though, Ruby suspects that Erin and Terry may not be the ideal guardians they seemed to be.

programme.title: Beyond Justice
programme.desc: Ex-C.I.A. Agent Tom Burton (Rutger Hauer) goes to Morocco with businesswoman Christine Sanders (Carol Alt) to rescue her son, the kidnapped heir to a desert fortune.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: Hondo is told to help make peace with Indian Chief Vittoro, whose daughter--Hondo's wife--had been killed by the Cavalry. Once the peace pipe is smoked, Hondo must deal with a renegade Native American who threatens the peace by randomly attacking settlers.

programme.title: Mill Of The Stone Women
programme.desc: In 19th century Holland, a professor of fine arts and an unlicensed surgeon run a secret lab where the professor's ill daughter receives blood-transfusions from kidnapped female victims who posthumously become macabre art.

programme.title: Sandokan: Pirate of Malaysia
programme.desc: Filmed in Singapore it tells the story of Sandokan who is a Malaysian rebel who, with a group of renegades, goes up against a British General who is trying to force the King to resign.

programme.title: If You Meet Sartana... Pray for Your Death
programme.desc: After a stagecoach is robbed and the passengers murdered, a long and tangled series of surprise attacks a murderous double-crosses leaves the coach’s strongbox in the hands of the killer Lasky. It is up to the legendary hero Sartana to track down the missing money and determine just who is ultimately behind the grisly robberies and killings.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: The suspect slips through law enforcement's fingers, but the detective finds the perfect partner to help with the case, the fugitive's wife; together they'll set a trap that even this criminal can't escape, until he does.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: Smugshot: Revenge of the PTA Mom
programme.desc: A wealthy Orange County mom and her husband, both attorneys, plot revenge on the PTA president for not properly supervising their son at school; it starts with a smear campaign, then escalates to police reports; eventually, she takes it too far.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: One woman's prestigious pedigree and dedication to social justice almost garner her a top-ranking political appointment, until her actions reveal a corruption scandal that goes deeper than ever expected.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: After an astounding winning streak made these Lake Erie partners the best fishermen at the year's top Walleye tournament, an unbelievable catch turns out to be just as implausible as it looks, shocking people world-wide.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: A wealthy Texas teen has a deadly drunk driving accident; his lawyers claim he suffers from affluenza, and it works, no jail time; caught violating his probation, he flees to Mexico, but there is more to this story than just the headlines.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: The twisted tale of an Orange County crime that set off an international manhunt and a Houdini-style jailbreak; and one detective will stop at nothing to get justice.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: The suspect slips through law enforcement's fingers, but the detective finds the perfect partner to help with the case, the fugitive's wife; together they'll set a trap that even this criminal can't escape, until he does.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: A romantic picnic quickly turns into a nightmare when a young couple goes missing; clues point to a satanic cult, but an even more absurd motive is revealed, leaving them naked and wandering the Australian outback with a slim chance of survival.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.desc: Gifting a priceless piece of artwork to a notorious island full of criminals sounds like just another one of Salvador Dalí's infamous stunts, but four decades later, someone finally got up the nerve to steal it from New York's Rikers Island.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Smugshot
programme.desc: When Anthony Cursio decided to rob a bank, he knew he could get away with it; his meticulous planning and surprising getaway confound police, but there is one thing he couldn't account for.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Smugshot
programme.desc: Rapper, entrepreneur, or just another social media scammer?; depends who you ask; French-Tunisian internet celebrity Swagg Man has made his way in and out of headlines and prisons on multiple continents, but his enemies are about to catch up to him.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Smugshot
programme.desc: A young couple and a retired doctor randomly meet, quickly bonding over spirituality and wellness; they move in together within a week, each of them having something to gain; within a year, one of them is dead and millions of dollars are at stake.

programme.title: True Crime Story: Smugshot
programme.desc: A true-crime, documentary, comedy MUSICAL about a Catholic school that never seems to raise enough money; the cash just keeps disappearing until the parents take things into their own hands, discovering a cover-up by the most unlikely criminal.

programme.title: Classic Ride
